description: The Copper CRM command line no one else built: full CRUD plus a local database, weighted pipeline forecasting, stale-deal detection, and the bulk operations Copper's own API refuses to provide.

tools.name: account_get
tools.description: Fetch account details. Returns the Account.

tools.name: activities_create
tools.description: Create a new activity. Required: parent, type. Optional: details, activity_date. Returns the new Activity.

tools.name: activities_delete
tools.description: Delete an activity. Required: id. Destructive.

tools.name: activities_get
tools.description: Fetch an activity by id. Required: id. Returns the Activity.

tools.name: activities_search
tools.description: List/search activities. Optional: page_number (default: 1), page_size (default: 20), sort_by (plus 4 more). Returns array of Activity.

tools.name: activity-types_list
tools.description: List all activity types.

tools.name: companies_activities
tools.description: List a company's activities. Required: id. Optional: page_number (default: 1), page_size (default: 20). Returns array of Activity.

tools.name: companies_create
tools.description: Create a new company. Required: name. Optional: address, email_domain, details (plus 4 more). Returns the new Company.

params.name: phone_numbers
params.description: JSON array of phone number objects

tools.description: Delete a company. Required: id. Destructive.

tools.name: companies_get
tools.description: Fetch a company by id. Required: id. Returns the Company.

tools.name: companies_search
tools.description: List/search companies. Optional: page_number (default: 1), page_size (default: 20), sort_by (plus 5 more). Returns array of Company.

params.name: email_domains
params.description: JSON array of email domains to filter by

params.description: JSON array of assignee (user) ids to filter by

params.description: JSON array of tag strings to filter by

tools.description: List all custom activity types. Returns array.

tools.name: custom-activity-types_update
tools.description: Update a custom activity type. Required: id. Optional: name, icon_type.

tools.name: custom-field-definitions_create
tools.description: Create a new custom field definition. Required: name, data_type. Optional: available_on, options.

params.name: data_type
params.description: Data type (String, Text, Dropdown, Date, etc.)

params.name: available_on
params.description: JSON array of entity types this field applies to

params.name: options
params.description: JSON array of option objects for Dropdown/MultiSelect fields

tools.description: Delete a custom field definition. Required: id. Destructive.

tools.description: Fetch a custom field definition by id. Required: id.

tools.description: List all custom field definitions. Returns array.

tools.description: Update a custom field definition. Required: id. Optional: name, options.

tools.name: webhooks_create
tools.description: Create a new webhook subscription. Required: target, type. Optional: event, secret.

params.name: type
params.description: Entity type to subscribe to (lead, person, company, opportunity, project, task)

params.name: event
params.description: JSON array of events (new, update, delete) or a single event string

params.name: secret
params.description: JSON secret object for signed payloads

tools.name: webhooks_delete
tools.description: Delete (unsubscribe) a webhook subscription. Required: id. Destructive.

tools.name: webhooks_get
tools.description: Fetch a webhook subscription by id. Required: id.

tools.description: List all webhook subscriptions. Returns array.
